title: Year Two Reflections: December 2027
author: Anonymous Researcher
Chronicles Archive
description: 2027 achievements I can't discuss: AI milestones, quantum breakthroughs, nanotech demos, BCI advancements. 2028 roadmap looks even crazier. We're accelerating. Is that good? Ask me in 5 years.
content:
**November 25, 2027**

Thanksgiving reflection: Grateful for this opportunity. Grateful for brilliant colleagues. Grateful for cutting-edge work.

Also: Slightly terrified we're moving too fast.

Also also: Can't slow down. Competition is fierce.

What could go wrong? 🙃

---

**December 30, 2027**

2027 achievements I can't discuss:
- AI milestone: [REDACTED]
- Quantum breakthrough: [REDACTED]
- Nanotech demo: [REDACTED]
- BCI advancement: [REDACTED]

2028 roadmap looks even crazier. We're accelerating.

Is that good? Ask me in 5 years.

---

Year Two: We moved faster than ever.

The question "should we?" became "can we beat the competition?"

Different question. Different answer.

— *Recovered from personal archive, 2030*
